narrative:
Eden Fall Township (precinct in Licking County) has 1,431 registered voters, with 49.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.1 percentage points.
